configurePresets.name: windows-cross
configurePresets.displayName: Windows cross (clang-cl + xwin, MSVC ABI; GPU selected via -D)
configurePresets.description: OpenCL (Khronos ICD loader) and OpenSSL (MSVC libs) are staged by the Docker image, not vcpkg, so no vcpkg manifest features are needed here; vcpkg supplies only Boost.

configurePresets.name: linux-cpu
configurePresets.displayName: Linux (native clang; CPU-only, no GPU backend)
configurePresets.description: CPU-only Linux build. Used by the arm64 container (and any CPU-only x64 build). vcpkg auto-detects the host triplet (arm64-linux or x64-linux). Only OpenSSL is pulled; no opencl feature.

configurePresets.name: macos-cpu
configurePresets.displayName: macOS (Apple Silicon, native clang; CPU-only, no GPU backend)
configurePresets.description: Native macOS build. CUDA and OpenCL are unavailable on macOS, so both GPU backends are OFF and only OpenSSL is pulled from vcpkg (no opencl feature). Produces a Mach-O `miner` binary; GPU mining is not supported on this platform.

configurePresets.name: macos-opencl
configurePresets.displayName: macOS (Apple Silicon, native clang; AMD OpenCL via Apple framework + CPU)
configurePresets.description: Native macOS GPU build. Links Apple's OpenCL.framework (1.2) for the AMD/OpenCL path; CPU backend on; NVIDIA off. Boost + OpenSSL + Khronos OpenCL headers from vcpkg. Produces a Mach-O `miner` that GPU-mines on Apple Silicon (Blake3 verified).
